2588  Real length = ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeLengthEdge2(face, node_coord);
2589  Real2 normal = ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeNormalEdge2(face, node_coord);
2590 
2591  for (Node node : iface->nodes()) {
2592  if (!node.isOwn())
2593  continue;
2594  Real rhs_value;
2595 
2596  if (scalarNeumann) {
2597  rhs_value = value * length / 2.0;
2598  }
2599  else {
2600  rhs_value = (normal.x * valueX + normal.y * valueY) * length / 2.0;
2601  }
2602 
2603  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 0)] += rhs_value;
2604  }
2605  }
2606  }
2607 
2608  static inline void applyNeumannToRhsQuad4(BC::INeumannBoundaryCondition* bs, const IndexedNodeDoFConnectivityView& node_dof, const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord, VariableDoFReal& rhs_values)
2609  {
2610  FaceGroup group = bs->getSurface();
2611 
2612  Real value = 0.0;
2613  Real valueX = 0.0;
2614  Real valueY = 0.0;
2615 
2616  bool scalarNeumann = false;
2617  const StringConstArrayView neumann_str = bs->getValue();
2618 
2619  if (neumann_str.size() == 1 && neumann_str[0] != "NULL") {
2620  scalarNeumann = true;
2621  value = std::stod(neumann_str[0].localstr());
2622  }
2623  else {
2624  if (neumann_str.size() > 1) {
2625  if (neumann_str[0] != "NULL")
2626  valueX = std::stod(neumann_str[0].localstr());
2627  if (neumann_str[1] != "NULL")
2628  valueY = std::stod(neumann_str[1].localstr());
2629  }
2630  }
2631 
2632  ENUMERATE_ (Face, iface, group) {
2633  Face face = *iface;
2634 
2635  // 2-point Gauss integration for line element
2636  constexpr Real gp[2] = { -M_SQRT1_3, M_SQRT1_3 }; // -1/sqrt(3), 1/sqrt(3)
2637  constexpr Real weights[2] = { 1.0, 1.0 };
2638 
2639  Real length = ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeLengthEdge2(face, node_coord);
2640  Real2 normal = ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeNormalEdge2(face, node_coord);
2641 
2642  Node node0 = face.node(0);
2643  Node node1 = face.node(1);
2644 
2645  for (Int32 i = 0; i < 2; ++i) {
2646  Real xi = gp[i];
2647  Real weight = weights[i];
2648 
2649  // Linear shape functions for Line2
2650  Real N[2];
2651  N[0] = 0.5 * (1 - xi);
2652  N[1] = 0.5 * (1 + xi);
2653 
2654  // Integration weight: weight * jacobian (length/2 for reference element [-1,1])
2655  Real integration_weight = weight * length * 0.5;
2656 
2657  // Apply to both nodes
2658  Node nodes[2] = { node0, node1 };
2659  for (Int32 j = 0; j < 2; ++j) {
2660  Node node = nodes[j];
2661  if (!node.isOwn())
2662  continue;
2663 
2664  Real rhs_value;
2665  if (scalarNeumann) {
2666  rhs_value = value * N[j] * integration_weight;
2667  }
2668  else {
2669  rhs_value = (normal.x * valueX + normal.y * valueY) * N[j] * integration_weight;
2670  }
2671 
2672  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 0)] += rhs_value;
2673  }
2674  }
2675  }
2676  }
2677 
2678  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
2687  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
2688 
2689  static inline void applyTractionToRhsTria3(BC::ITractionBoundaryCondition* bs, const IndexedNodeDoFConnectivityView& node_dof, const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord, VariableDoFReal& rhs_values)
2690  {
2691  // mesh boundary group on which traction is applied
2692  FaceGroup group = bs->getSurface();
2693 
2694  Real3 t;
2695  // get traction force vector
2696  bool applyTraction = false;
2697  const UniqueArray<String> t_string = bs->getValue();
2698  for (Int32 i = 0; i < t_string.size(); ++i) {
2699  t[i] = 0.0;
2700  if (t_string[i] != "NULL") {
2701  applyTraction = true;
2702  t[i] = std::stod(t_string[i].localstr());
2703  }
2704  }
2705 
2706  // no traction to apply hence return
2707  if (!applyTraction)
2708  return;
2709 
2710  ENUMERATE_ (Face, iface, group) {
2711  Face face = *iface;
2712  Real length = ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeLengthEdge2(face, node_coord);
2713  for (Node node : iface->nodes()) {
2714  if (node.isOwn()) {
2715  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 0)] += t[0] * length / 2.;
2716  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 1)] += t[1] * length / 2.;
2717  }
2718  }
2719  }
2720  }
2721 
2722  static inline void applyTractionToRhsQuad4(BC::ITractionBoundaryCondition* bs, const IndexedNodeDoFConnectivityView& node_dof, const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord, VariableDoFReal& rhs_values)
2723  {
2724  // mesh boundary group on which traction is applied
2725  FaceGroup group = bs->getSurface();
2726 
2727  Real3 t;
2728  // get traction force vector
2729  bool applyTraction = false;
2730  const UniqueArray<String> t_string = bs->getValue();
2731  for (Int32 i = 0; i < t_string.size(); ++i) {
2732  t[i] = 0.0;
2733  if (t_string[i] != "NULL") {
2734  applyTraction = true;
2735  t[i] = std::stod(t_string[i].localstr());
2736  }
2737  }
2738 
2739  // no traction to apply hence return
2740  if (!applyTraction)
2741  return;
2742 
2743  ENUMERATE_ (Face, iface, group) {
2744  Face face = *iface;
2745 
2746  // 2-point Gauss integration for line element
2747  constexpr Real gp[2] = { -M_SQRT1_3, M_SQRT1_3 }; // -1/sqrt(3), 1/sqrt(3)
2748  constexpr Real weights[2] = { 1.0, 1.0 };
2749 
2750  Real length = ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeLengthEdge2(face, node_coord);
2751  Real2 normal = ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeNormalEdge2(face, node_coord);
2752 
2753  Node node0 = face.node(0);
2754  Node node1 = face.node(1);
2755 
2756  for (Int32 i = 0; i < 2; ++i) {
2757  Real xi = gp[i];
2758  Real weight = weights[i];
2759 
2760  // Linear shape functions for Line2
2761  Real N[2];
2762  N[0] = 0.5 * (1 - xi);
2763  N[1] = 0.5 * (1 + xi);
2764 
2765  // Integration weight: weight * jacobian (length/2 for reference element [-1,1])
2766  Real integration_weight = weight * length * 0.5;
2767 
2768  // Apply to both nodes
2769  Node nodes[2] = { node0, node1 };
2770  for (Int32 j = 0; j < 2; ++j) {
2771  Node node = nodes[j];
2772  if (!node.isOwn())
2773  continue;
2774 
2775  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 0)] += t[0] * N[j] * integration_weight;
2776  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 1)] += t[1] * N[j] * integration_weight;
2777  }
2778  }
2779  }
2780  }
2781 
2782  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
2794  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
2795 
2796  static inline void applyTractionTableToRhsTria3(BC::ITractionBoundaryCondition* bs, const Real t, Int32 boundary_condition_index, const UniqueArray<Arcane::FemUtils::CaseTableInfo>& traction_case_table_list, const IndexedNodeDoFConnectivityView& node_dof, const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord, VariableDoFReal& rhs_values)
2797  {
2798  // mesh boundary group on which traction is applied
2799  FaceGroup group = bs->getSurface();
2800 
2801  bool applyTraction = false;
2802  Real3 trac;
2803  auto traction_table_file_name = bs->getTractionInputFile();
2804  bool getTractionFromTable = !traction_table_file_name.empty();
2805 
2806  if (getTractionFromTable) {
2807 
2808  const Arcane::FemUtils::CaseTableInfo& case_table_info = traction_case_table_list[boundary_condition_index++];
2809  applyTraction = true;
2810 
2811  CaseTable* ct = case_table_info.case_table;
2812  if (!ct)
2813  ARCANE_FATAL("CaseTable is null. Maybe there is a missing call to _readCaseTables()");
2814  if (traction_table_file_name != case_table_info.file_name)
2815  ARCANE_FATAL("Incoherent CaseTable. The current CaseTable is associated to file '{0}'", case_table_info.file_name);
2816 
2817  ct->value(t, trac);
2818  }
2819 
2820  // no traction to apply hence return
2821  if (!applyTraction)
2822  return;
2823 
2824  ENUMERATE_ (Face, iface, group) {
2825  Face face = *iface;
2826  Real length = ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeLengthEdge2(face, node_coord);
2827  for (Node node : iface->nodes()) {
2828  if (node.isOwn()) {
2829  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 0)] += trac[0] * length / 2.;
2830  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 1)] += trac[1] * length / 2.;
2831  }
2832  }
2833  }
2834  }
2835 
2836  static inline void applyTractionTableToRhsQuad4(BC::ITractionBoundaryCondition* bs, const Real t, Int32 boundary_condition_index, const UniqueArray<CaseTableInfo>& traction_case_table_list, const IndexedNodeDoFConnectivityView& node_dof, const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord, VariableDoFReal& rhs_values)
2837  {
2838  // mesh boundary group on which traction is applied
2839  FaceGroup group = bs->getSurface();
2840 
2841  bool applyTraction = false;
2842  Real3 trac;
2843  auto traction_table_file_name = bs->getTractionInputFile();
2844  bool getTractionFromTable = !traction_table_file_name.empty();
2845 
2846  if (getTractionFromTable) {
2847 
2848  const CaseTableInfo& case_table_info = traction_case_table_list[boundary_condition_index++];
2849  applyTraction = true;
2850 
2851  CaseTable* ct = case_table_info.case_table;
2852  if (!ct)
2853  ARCANE_FATAL("CaseTable is null. Maybe there is a missing call to _readCaseTables()");
2854  if (traction_table_file_name != case_table_info.file_name)
2855  ARCANE_FATAL("Incoherent CaseTable. The current CaseTable is associated to file '{0}'", case_table_info.file_name);
2856 
2857  ct->value(t, trac);
2858  }
2859 
2860  // no traction to apply hence return
2861  if (!applyTraction)
2862  return;
2863 
2864  ENUMERATE_ (Face, iface, group) {
2865  Face face = *iface;
2866 
2867  // 2-point Gauss integration for line element
2868  constexpr Real gp[2] = { -M_SQRT1_3, M_SQRT1_3 }; // -1/sqrt(3), 1/sqrt(3)
2869  constexpr Real weights[2] = { 1.0, 1.0 };
2870 
2871  Real length = ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeLengthEdge2(face, node_coord);
2872  Real2 normal = ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeNormalEdge2(face, node_coord);
2873 
2874  Node node0 = face.node(0);
2875  Node node1 = face.node(1);
2876 
2877  for (Int32 i = 0; i < 2; ++i) {
2878  Real xi = gp[i];
2879  Real weight = weights[i];
2880 
2881  // Linear shape functions for Line2
2882  Real N[2];
2883  N[0] = 0.5 * (1 - xi);
2884  N[1] = 0.5 * (1 + xi);
2885 
2886  // Integration weight: weight * jacobian (length/2 for reference element [-1,1])
2887  Real integration_weight = weight * length * 0.5;
2888 
2889  // Apply to both nodes
2890  Node nodes[2] = { node0, node1 };
2891  for (Int32 j = 0; j < 2; ++j) {
2892  Node node = nodes[j];
2893  if (!node.isOwn())
2894  continue;
2895 
2896  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 0)] += trac[0] * N[j] * integration_weight;
2897  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 1)] += trac[1] * N[j] * integration_weight;
2898  }
2899  }
2900  }
2901  }
2902 
2903  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
2920  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
2921  static inline void applyManufacturedDirichletToLhsAndRhs(IBinaryMathFunctor<Real, Real3, Real>* manufactured_dirichlet, Real /*lambda*/, const FaceGroup& group, BC::IManufacturedSolution* bs, const IndexedNodeDoFConnectivityView& node_dof, const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord, DoFLinearSystem& m_linear_system, VariableDoFReal& rhs_values)
2922  {
2923  Real penalty = bs->getPenalty();
2924  NodeGroup node_group = group.nodeGroup();
2925  ENUMERATE_ (Node, inode, node_group) {
2926  Node node = *inode;
2927  if (node.isOwn()) {
2928  m_linear_system.matrixSetValue(node_dof.dofId(node, 0), node_dof.dofId(node, 0), penalty);
2929  Real u_g = penalty * manufactured_dirichlet->apply(1., node_coord[node]);
2930  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 0)] = u_g;
2931  }
2932  }
2933  }
2934  };
2935 
2936  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
2942  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
2943  class CellFEMDispatcher
2944  {
2945 
2946  public:
2947 
2948  Real getShapeFuncVal(Int16 /*item_type*/, Integer /*inod*/, Real3 /*ref coord*/);
2949  Real3 getShapeFuncDeriv(Int16 /*item_type*/, Integer /*inod*/, Real3 /*ref coord*/);
2950 
2951  RealUniqueArray getGaussData(ItemWithNodes item, Integer nint, Integer ngauss);
2952 
2953  CellFEMDispatcher();
2954 
2955  private:
2956 
2957  std::function<Real(Integer inod, Real3 coord)> m_shapefunc[NB_BASIC_ITEM_TYPE];
2958  std::function<Real3(Integer inod, Real3 coord)> m_shapefuncderiv[NB_BASIC_ITEM_TYPE];
2959  };
2960 
2961  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
2970  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
2971  class FemShapeMethods
2972  {
2973  public:
2974 
2975  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
2984  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
2985  static inline Real line2ShapeFuncVal(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
2986  {
2987 #ifdef _DEBUG
2988  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 2);
2989 #endif
2990 
2991  Real r = ref_coord[0];
2992  if (inod == 1)
2993  return (0.5 * (1 + r));
2994  return (0.5 * (1 - r));
2995  }
2996 
2997  static inline Real3 line2ShapeFuncDeriv(Integer inod, Real3)
2998  {
2999  if (inod == 1)
3000  return { 0.5, 0., 0. };
3001  return { -0.5, 0., 0. };
3002  }
3003 
3004  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3013  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3014  static inline Real line3ShapeFuncVal(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3015  {
3016 #ifdef _DEBUG
3017  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 3);
3018 #endif
3019 
3020  Real ri = ref_coord[0];
3021  if (inod == 0)
3022  ri *= -1;
3023 
3024  if (inod < 2)
3025  return 0.5 * ri * (1 + ri); // nodes 0 or 1
3026  return (1 - ri * ri); // middle node
3027  }
3028 
3029  static inline Real3 line3ShapeFuncDeriv(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3030  {
3031  Real ri = ref_coord[0];
3032  if (!inod)
3033  return { -0.5 + ri, 0., 0. };
3034  if (inod == 1)
3035  return { 0.5 + ri, 0., 0. };
3036  return { -2. * ri, 0., 0. };
3037  }
3038 
3039  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3058  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3059  static inline Real tri3ShapeFuncVal(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3060  {
3061 #ifdef _DEBUG
3062  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 3);
3063 #endif
3064  Real r = ref_coord[0];
3065  Real s = ref_coord[1];
3066  if (!inod)
3067  return (1 - r - s);
3068  if (inod == 1)
3069  return r;
3070  return s;
3071  }
3072 
3073  static inline Real3 tri3ShapeFuncDeriv(Integer inod, Real3)
3074  {
3075  if (!inod)
3076  return { -1., -1., 0. };
3077  if (inod == 1)
3078  return { 1., 0., 0. };
3079  return { 0., 1., 0. };
3080  }
3081 
3082  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3101  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3102  static inline Real tri6ShapeFuncVal(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3103  {
3104 #ifdef _DEBUG
3105  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 6);
3106 #endif
3107  auto wi = 0., ri = ref_coord[0], si = ref_coord[1];
3108  auto ri2 = 2. * ri - 1.;
3109  auto si2 = 2. * si - 1.;
3110  auto ti = 1. - ri - si, ti2 = 2. * ti - 1.;
3111 
3112  switch (inod) {
3113  default:
3114  break;
3115  case 0:
3116  wi = ti * ti2;
3117  break;
3118  case 1:
3119  wi = ri * ri2;
3120  break;
3121  case 2:
3122  wi = si * si2;
3123  break;
3124  case 3:
3125  wi = 4. * ri * ti;
3126  break;
3127  case 4:
3128  wi = 4. * ri * si;
3129  break;
3130  case 5:
3131  wi = 4. * si * ti;
3132  break;
3133  }
3134  return wi;
3135  }
3136 
3137  static inline Real3 tri6ShapeFuncDeriv(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3138  {
3139  auto ri = ref_coord[0], si = ref_coord[1];
3140  auto ti = 1. - ri - si;
3141 
3142  if (!inod) {
3143  auto wi = -3. + 4. * (ri + si);
3144  return { wi, wi, 0. };
3145  }
3146  if (inod == 1)
3147  return { -1. + 4. * ri, 0., 0. };
3148  if (inod == 2)
3149  return { 0., -1. + 4. * si, 0. };
3150 
3151  if (inod == 3)
3152  return { 4. * (ti - ri), -4. * ri, 0. };
3153  if (inod == 4)
3154  return { 4. * si, 4. * ri, 0. };
3155  return { -4. * si, 4. * (ti - si), 0. };
3156  }
3157 
3158  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3176  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3177  static inline Real quad4ShapeFuncVal(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3178  {
3179 #ifdef _DEBUG
3180  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 4);
3181 #endif
3182 
3183  auto r{ ref_coord[0] }, s{ ref_coord[1] };
3184  auto ri{ 1. }, si{ 1. };
3185 
3186  switch (inod) {
3187  default:
3188  break; // default is first node (index 0)
3189  case 2:
3190  si = -1;
3191  [[fallthrough]];
3192  case 1:
3193  ri = -1;
3194  break;
3195 
3196  case 3:
3197  si = -1;
3198  break;
3199  }
3200  return ((1 + ri * r) * (1 + si * s) / 4.);
3201  }
3202 
3203  static inline Real3 quad4ShapeFuncDeriv(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3204  {
3205 #ifdef _DEBUG
3206  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 4);
3207 #endif
3208 
3209  auto r{ ref_coord[0] }, s{ ref_coord[1] };
3210  auto ri{ 1. }, si{ 1. }; // Normalized coordinates (=+-1) =>node index 7 = (1,1,1)
3211 
3212  switch (inod) {
3213  default:
3214  break; // default is first node (index 0)
3215  case 2:
3216  si = -1;
3217  [[fallthrough]];
3218  case 1:
3219  ri = -1;
3220  break;
3221 
3222  case 3:
3223  si = -1;
3224  break;
3225  }
3226  return { 0.25 * ri * (1 + si * s), 0.25 * si * (1 + ri * r), 0. };
3227  }
3228 
3229  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3250  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3251  static inline Real quad8ShapeFuncVal(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3252  {
3253 #ifdef _DEBUG
3254  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 8);
3255 #endif
3256  Real tol{1.0e-15};
3257 
3258  auto r{ ref_coord[0] }, s{ ref_coord[1] };
3259  auto ri{ 1. }, si{ 1. };
3260 
3261  switch (inod) {
3262  default:
3263  break; // default is first node (index 0)
3264  case 2:
3265  si = -1;
3266  [[fallthrough]];
3267  case 1:
3268  ri = -1;
3269  break;
3270 
3271  case 3:
3272  si = -1;
3273  break;
3274 
3275  case 6:
3276  si = -1;
3277  [[fallthrough]];
3278  case 4:
3279  ri = 0;
3280  break;
3281 
3282  case 5:
3283  ri = -1;
3284  [[fallthrough]];
3285  case 7:
3286  si = 0;
3287  break;
3288  }
3289 
3290  auto r0{ r * ri }, s0{ s * si };
3291  Real Phi{ 0. };
3292  auto t0{ r0 + s0 - 1. };
3293 
3294  if (inod < 4) // Corner nodes
3295  Phi = (1 + r0) * (1 + s0) * t0 / 4.;
3296 
3297  else { // Middle nodes
3298  if (fabs(ri) < tol)
3299  Phi = (1 - r * r) * (1 + s0) / 2.;
3300  else if (fabs(si) < tol)
3301  Phi = (1 - s * s) * (1 + r0) / 2.;
3302  }
3303  return Phi;
3304  }
3305 
3306  static inline Real3 quad8ShapeFuncDeriv(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3307  {
3308  Real tol{1.0e-15};
3309 
3310  auto r{ ref_coord[0] }, s{ ref_coord[1] };
3311  auto ri{ 1. }, si{ 1. };
3312 
3313  switch (inod) {
3314  default:
3315  break; // default is first node (index 0)
3316  case 2:
3317  si = -1;
3318  [[fallthrough]];
3319  case 1:
3320  ri = -1;
3321  break;
3322 
3323  case 3:
3324  si = -1;
3325  break;
3326 
3327  case 6:
3328  si = -1;
3329  [[fallthrough]];
3330  case 4:
3331  ri = 0;
3332  break;
3333 
3334  case 5:
3335  ri = -1;
3336  [[fallthrough]];
3337  case 7:
3338  si = 0;
3339  break;
3340  }
3341 
3342  auto r0{ r * ri }, s0{ s * si };
3343  Real3 dPhi;
3344  auto t0{ r0 + s0 - 1. };
3345 
3346  if (inod < 4) { // Corner nodes
3347  dPhi.x = ri * (1 + s0) * (t0 + 1. + r0) / 4.;
3348  dPhi.y = si * (1 + r0) * (t0 + 1. + s0) / 4.;
3349  }
3350  else { // Middle nodes
3351  if (fabs(ri) < tol) {
3352  dPhi.x = -r * (1 + s0);
3353  dPhi.y = si * (1 - r * r) / 2.;
3354  }
3355  else if (fabs(si) < tol) {
3356  dPhi.x = -s * (1 + r0);
3357  dPhi.y = ri * (1 - s * s) / 2.;
3358  }
3359  }
3360  dPhi.z = 0.;
3361  return dPhi;
3362  }
3363 
3364  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3387  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3388  static inline Real hexa8ShapeFuncVal(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3389  {
3390 #ifdef _DEBUG
3391  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 8);
3392 #endif
3393  auto x{ ref_coord[0] }, y{ ref_coord[1] }, z{ ref_coord[2] };
3394  auto ri{ 1. }, si{ 1. }, ti{ 1. }; // Normalized coordinates (=+-1) =>node index 7 = (1,1,1)
3395 
3396  switch (inod) {
3397  default:
3398  break;
3399  case 3:
3400  case 2:
3401  ri = -1;
3402  break;
3403  case 0:
3404  case 1:
3405  ri = -1;
3406  si = -1;
3407  break;
3408  case 4:
3409  case 5:
3410  si = -1;
3411  break;
3412  }
3413  if (inod == 1 || inod == 2 || inod == 5 || inod == 6)
3414  ti = -1;
3415 
3416  auto r0{ x * ri }, s0{ y * si }, t0{ z * ti };
3417  auto Phi = (1 + r0) * (1 + s0) * (1 + t0) / 8.;
3418 
3419  return Phi;
3420  }
3421 
3422  static inline Real3 hexa8ShapeFuncDeriv(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3423  {
3424 
3425  auto x{ ref_coord[0] }, y{ ref_coord[1] }, z{ ref_coord[2] };
3426  auto ri{ 1. }, si{ 1. }, ti{ 1. }; // Normalized coordinates (=+-1) =>node index 7 = (1,1,1)
3427 
3428  switch (inod) {
3429  default:
3430  break;
3431  case 3:
3432  case 2:
3433  ri = -1;
3434  break;
3435  case 0:
3436  case 1:
3437  ri = -1;
3438  si = -1;
3439  break;
3440  case 4:
3441  case 5:
3442  si = -1;
3443  break;
3444  }
3445  if (inod == 1 || inod == 2 || inod == 5 || inod == 6)
3446  ti = -1;
3447 
3448  auto r0{ x * ri }, s0{ y * si }, t0{ z * ti };
3449  Real3 dPhi;
3450  dPhi.x = ri * (1 + s0) * (1 + t0) / 8.;
3451  dPhi.y = si * (1 + r0) * (1 + t0) / 8.;
3452  dPhi.z = ti * (1 + r0) * (1 + s0) / 8.;
3453  return dPhi;
3454  }
3455 
3456  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3479  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3480 
3481  static inline Real hexa20ShapeFuncVal(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3482  {
3483 #ifdef _DEBUG
3484  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 20);
3485 #endif
3486  Real tol{1.0e-15};
3487 
3488  auto x{ ref_coord[0] }, y{ ref_coord[1] }, z{ ref_coord[2] };
3489  auto ri{ 1. }, si{ 1. }, ti{ 1. }; // Normalized coordinates (=+-1) =>node index 0 = (1,1,1)
3490 
3491  switch (inod) {
3492  default:
3493  break;
3494 
3495  case 5:
3496  ti = -1.;
3497  [[fallthrough]];
3498  case 1:
3499  ri = -1;
3500  break;
3501 
3502  case 6:
3503  ti = -1.;
3504  [[fallthrough]];
3505  case 2:
3506  ri = -1;
3507  si = -1;
3508  break;
3509 
3510  case 7:
3511  ti = -1.;
3512  [[fallthrough]];
3513  case 3:
3514  si = -1;
3515  break;
3516 
3517  case 4:
3518  ti = -1.;
3519  break;
3520 
3521  case 9:
3522  ri = -1.;
3523  [[fallthrough]];
3524  case 11:
3525  si = 0.;
3526  break;
3527 
3528  case 10:
3529  si = -1.;
3530  [[fallthrough]];
3531  case 8:
3532  ri = 0.;
3533  break;
3534 
3535  case 14:
3536  si = -1.;
3537  [[fallthrough]];
3538  case 12:
3539  ri = 0.;
3540  ti = -1.;
3541  break;
3542 
3543  case 17:
3544  si = -1.;
3545  [[fallthrough]];
3546  case 16:
3547  ri = -1.;
3548  ti = 0.;
3549  break;
3550 
3551  case 18:
3552  si = -1.;
3553  [[fallthrough]];
3554  case 19:
3555  ti = 0.;
3556  break;
3557  }
3558 
3559  auto r0{ x * ri }, s0{ y * si }, t0{ z * ti };
3560  Real Phi{ 0. };
3561  auto t{ r0 + s0 + t0 - 2. };
3562 
3563  if (inod < 8) // Corner nodes
3564  Phi = (1 + r0) * (1 + s0) * (1 + t0) * t / 8.;
3565 
3566  else { // Middle nodes
3567  if (math::abs(ri) < tol)
3568  Phi = (1 - x * x) * (1 + s0) * (1 + t0) / 4.;
3569  else if (math::abs(si) < tol)
3570  Phi = (1 - y * y) * (1 + r0) * (1 + t0) / 4.;
3571  else if (math::abs(ti) < tol)
3572  Phi = (1 - z * z) * (1 + r0) * (1 + s0) / 4.;
3573  }
3574  return Phi;
3575  }
3576 
3577  static inline Real3 hexa20ShapeFuncDeriv(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3578  {
3579  Real tol{1.0e-15};
3580 
3581  auto x{ ref_coord[0] }, y{ ref_coord[1] }, z{ ref_coord[2] };
3582  auto ri{ 1. }, si{ 1. }, ti{ 1. }; // Normalized coordinates (=+-1) =>node index 0 = (1,1,1)
3583 
3584  switch (inod) {
3585  default:
3586  break;
3587 
3588  case 5:
3589  ti = -1.;
3590  case 1:
3591  ri = -1;
3592  break;
3593 
3594  case 6:
3595  ti = -1.;
3596  case 2:
3597  ri = -1;
3598  si = -1;
3599  break;
3600 
3601  case 7:
3602  ti = -1.;
3603  case 3:
3604  si = -1;
3605  break;
3606 
3607  case 4:
3608  ti = -1.;
3609  break;
3610 
3611  case 9:
3612  ri = -1.;
3613  case 11:
3614  si = 0.;
3615  break;
3616 
3617  case 10:
3618  si = -1.;
3619  case 8:
3620  ri = 0.;
3621  break;
3622 
3623  case 14:
3624  si = -1.;
3625  case 12:
3626  ri = 0.;
3627  ti = -1.;
3628  break;
3629 
3630  case 17:
3631  si = -1.;
3632  case 16:
3633  ri = -1.;
3634  ti = 0.;
3635  break;
3636 
3637  case 18:
3638  si = -1.;
3639  case 19:
3640  ti = 0.;
3641  break;
3642  }
3643 
3644  auto r0{ x * ri }, s0{ y * si }, t0{ z * ti };
3645  auto t{ r0 + s0 + t0 - 2. };
3646  Real3 dPhi;
3647 
3648  if (inod < 8) { // Corner nodes
3649  dPhi = hexa8ShapeFuncDeriv(inod, ref_coord);
3650  dPhi.x *= (t + 1. + r0);
3651  dPhi.y *= (t + 1. + s0);
3652  dPhi.z *= (t + 1. + t0);
3653  }
3654  else { // Middle nodes
3655  auto x2{ x * x }, y2{ y * y }, z2{ z * z };
3656  if (math::abs(ri) < tol) {
3657  dPhi.x = -x * (1 + s0) * (1 + t0) / 2.;
3658  dPhi.y = si * (1 - x2) * (1 + t0) / 4.;
3659  dPhi.z = ti * (1 - x2) * (1 + s0) / 4.;
3660  }
3661  else if (math::abs(si) < tol) {
3662  dPhi.x = ri * (1 - y2) * (1 + t0) / 4.;
3663  dPhi.y = -y * (1 + r0) * (1 + t0) / 2.;
3664  dPhi.z = ti * (1 - y2) * (1 + r0) / 4.;
3665  }
3666  else if (math::abs(ti) < tol) {
3667  dPhi.x = ri * (1 - z2) * (1 + s0) / 4.;
3668  dPhi.y = si * (1 - z2) * (1 + r0) / 4.;
3669  dPhi.z = -z * (1 + r0) * (1 + s0) / 2.;
3670  }
3671  }
3672  return dPhi;
3673  }
3674 
3675  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3695  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3696 
3697  static inline Real tetra4ShapeFuncVal(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3698  {
3699 #ifdef _DEBUG
3700  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 4);
3701 #endif
3702 
3703  auto ri = ref_coord[0], si = ref_coord[1], ti = ref_coord[2]; // default is first node (index 3)
3704 
3705  switch (inod) {
3706  default:
3707  break;
3708  case 1:
3709  return ri;
3710  case 2:
3711  return si;
3712  case 0:
3713  return (1. - ri - si - ti);
3714  }
3715  return ti;
3716  }
3717 
3718  static inline Real3 tetra4ShapeFuncDeriv(Integer inod, Real3 /*ref_coord*/)
3719  {
3720 
3721  if (inod == 3)
3722  return { 0., 0., 1. };
3723  if (inod == 1)
3724  return { 1., 0., 0. };
3725  if (inod == 2)
3726  return { 0., 1., 0. };
3727  return { -1., -1., -1. };
3728  }
3729 
3730  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3750  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3751 
3752  static inline Real tetra10ShapeFuncVal(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3753  {
3754 #ifdef _DEBUG
3755  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 10);
3756 #endif
3757 
3758  auto x = ref_coord[0], y = ref_coord[1], z = ref_coord[2],
3759  t = 1. - x - y - z,
3760  wi{ 0. };
3761 
3762  switch (inod) {
3763  default:
3764  break;
3765 
3766  // Corner nodes
3767  case 0:
3768  wi = t * (2 * t - 1.);
3769  break; //=(1. - 2*x - 2*y - 2*z) * t
3770  case 1:
3771  wi = x * (2 * x - 1.);
3772  break; //=(1. - 2*t - 2*y - 2*z)*x
3773  case 2:
3774  wi = y * (2 * y - 1.);
3775  break; //=(1. - 2*x - 2*t - 2*z)*y
3776  case 3:
3777  wi = z * (2 * z - 1.);
3778  break; //=(1. - 2*t - 2*x - 2*y)*z
3779 
3780  // Middle nodes
3781  case 4:
3782  wi = 4 * x * t;
3783  break;
3784  case 5:
3785  wi = 4 * x * y;
3786  break;
3787  case 6:
3788  wi = 4 * y * t;
3789  break;
3790  case 7:
3791  wi = 4 * z * t;
3792  break;
3793  case 8:
3794  wi = 4 * z * x;
3795  break;
3796  case 9:
3797  wi = 4 * z * y;
3798  break;
3799  }
3800  return wi;
3801  }
3802 
3803  static inline Real3 tetra10ShapeFuncDeriv(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3804  {
3805  auto x{ ref_coord[0] }, y{ ref_coord[1] }, z{ ref_coord[2] },
3806  t{ 1. - x - y - z },
3807  x4{ 4 * x },
3808  y4{ 4 * y },
3809  z4{ 4 * z },
3810  t4{ 4 * t };
3811 
3812  // Corner nodes
3813  /*
3814  if (inod == 3) return {0.,0.,1. + 2*t - 2*x - 2*y + 2*z};
3815  if (inod == 1) return {1. - 2*t - 2*y - 2*z + 2*x,0.,0.};
3816  if (inod == 2) return {0.,1. - 2*x - 2*t - 2*z + 2*y,0.};
3817  if (!inod) return {-1. - 2*t + 2*x + 2*y + 2*z,-1. - 2*t+ 2*x + 2*y + 2*z,-1. - 2*t + 2*x + 2*y + 2*z};
3818 */
3819  if (!inod)
3820  return { 1. - t4, 1. - t4, 1. - t4 };
3821  if (inod == 1)
3822  return { x4 - 1., 0., 0. };
3823  if (inod == 2)
3824  return { 0., y4 - 1., 0. };
3825  if (inod == 3)
3826  return { 0., 0., z4 - 1. };
3827 
3828  // Middle nodes
3829  if (inod == 4)
3830  return { t4 - x4, -x4, -x4 };
3831  if (inod == 5)
3832  return { y4, x4, 0. };
3833  if (inod == 6)
3834  return { -y4, t4 - y4, -y4 };
3835  if (inod == 8)
3836  return { z4, 0., x4 };
3837  if (inod == 9)
3838  return { 0., z4, y4 };
3839  return { -z4, -z4, t4 - z4 }; //inod == 7
3840  }
3841 
3842  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3867  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3868 
3869  static inline Real penta6ShapeFuncVal(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3870  {
3871 #ifdef _DEBUG
3872  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 6);
3873 #endif
3874  auto r{ ref_coord[0] }, s{ ref_coord[1] }, t{ ref_coord[2] };
3875  auto r0{ 1. }, s0{ 1. }, ti{ -1. };
3876  auto rs{ 1. - r - s };
3877 
3878  if (inod >= 3)
3879  ti = 1.;
3880  auto t0{ 1 + ti * t };
3881 
3882  switch (inod) {
3883  default:
3884  break; // Node 0
3885  case 4:
3886  case 1:
3887  r0 = r;
3888  rs = 1.;
3889  break;
3890  case 5:
3891  case 2:
3892  s0 = s;
3893  rs = 1.;
3894  break;
3895  }
3896 
3897  return 0.5 * r0 * s0 * rs * t0;
3898  }
3899 
3900  static inline Real3 penta6ShapeFuncDeriv(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3901  {
3902 
3903 #ifdef _DEBUG
3904  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 6);
3905 #endif
3906  auto r{ ref_coord[0] }, s{ ref_coord[1] }, t{ ref_coord[2] };
3907  auto ri{ 1. }, si{ 1. };
3908  auto r0{ 1. }, s0{ 1. }, ti{ -1. };
3909  auto rs{ 1. - r - s };
3910 
3911  if (inod >= 3)
3912  ti = 1.;
3913  auto t0{ 1 + ti * t };
3914 
3915  switch (inod) {
3916  default:
3917  break;
3918  case 3:
3919  case 0:
3920  ri = -1.;
3921  si = -1.;
3922  break;
3923  case 4:
3924  case 1:
3925  r0 = r;
3926  si = 0.;
3927  rs = 1.;
3928  break;
3929  case 5:
3930  case 2:
3931  s0 = s;
3932  rs = 1.;
3933  break;
3934  }
3935 
3936  Real3 dPhi;
3937  dPhi.x = 0.5 * ri * t0;
3938  dPhi.y = 0.5 * si * t0;
3939  dPhi.z = 0.5 * ti * rs * r0 * s0;
3940  return dPhi;
3941  }
3942 
3943  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3970  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
3971 
3972  static inline Real pyramid5ShapeFuncVal(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
3973  {
3974 #ifdef _DEBUG
3975  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 5);
3976 #endif
3977  Real tol{1.0e-15};
3978 
3979  auto r{ ref_coord[0] }, s{ ref_coord[1] }, t{ ref_coord[2] };
3980  auto r1{ -1. }, s1{ 1. }, r2{ -1. }, s2{ -1. };
3981 
3982  if (inod == 4)
3983  return t;
3984  auto ti{ t - 1. };
3985  auto t0{ 0. };
3986 
3987  if (math::abs(ti) < tol)
3988  ti = 0.;
3989  else
3990  t0 = -1. / ti / 4.;
3991 
3992  switch (inod) {
3993  case 1:
3994  s1 = -1.;
3995  r2 = 1.;
3996  break;
3997  case 2:
3998  r1 = 1.;
3999  r2 = 1.;
4000  break;
4001  case 3:
4002  r1 = 1.;
4003  s2 = 1.;
4004  break;
4005  default:
4006  break; // default is for node 0
4007  }
4008 
4009  return (r1 * r + s1 * s + ti) * (r2 * r + s2 * s + ti) * t0;
4010  }
4011 
4012  static inline Real3 pyramid5ShapeFuncDeriv(Integer inod, Real3 ref_coord)
4013  {
4014 
4015 #ifdef _DEBUG
4016  ARCANE_ASSERT(inod >= 0 && inod < 5);
4017 #endif
4018  Real tol{1.0e-15};
4019 
4020  auto r{ ref_coord[0] }, s{ ref_coord[1] }, t{ ref_coord[2] };
4021  auto r1{ -1. }, s1{ 1. }, r2{ -1. }, s2{ -1. };
4022 
4023  auto ti{ t - 1. };
4024  auto t0{ 0. };
4025 
4026  if (math::abs(ti) < tol)
4027  ti = 0.;
4028  else
4029  t0 = -1. / ti / 4.;
4030 
4031  switch (inod) {
4032  case 1:
4033  s1 = -1.;
4034  r2 = 1.;
4035  break;
4036  case 2:
4037  r1 = 1.;
4038  r2 = 1.;
4039  break;
4040  case 3:
4041  r1 = 1.;
4042  s2 = 1.;
4043  break;
4044  default:
4045  break; // default is for node 0
4046  }
4047 
4048  if (inod == 4)
4049  return { 0., 0., 1. };
4050 
4051  Real3 dPhi;
4052  auto r12{ r1 + r2 }, rr{ 2. * r1 * r2 }, s12{ s1 + s2 }, ss{ 2. * s1 * s2 }, rs{ r1 * s2 + r2 * s1 }, t02{ 4. * t0 * t0 };
4053 
4054  dPhi.x = t0 * (rr * r + rs * s + r12 * ti);
4055  dPhi.y = t0 * (rs * r + ss * s + s12 * ti);
4056 
4057  if (math::abs(ti) < tol)
4058  dPhi.z = 0.;
4059  else
4060  dPhi.z = t0 * (r12 * r + s12 * s + 2. * ti) + t02 * (r1 * r + s1 * s + ti) * (r2 * r + s2 * s + ti);
4061 
4062  return dPhi;
4063  }
4064 
4065  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4066  };
4067 
4068  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4075  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4076  class FemGaussQuadrature
4077  {
4078 
4079  public:
4080 
4081  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4086  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4087  static inline Integer getNbGaussPointsfromOrder(Int16 cell_type, Integer ninteg)
4088  {
4089  Integer nbgauss{ 0 };
4090  auto ninteg2{ ninteg * ninteg };
4091  auto ninteg3{ ninteg2 * ninteg };
4092 
4093  if (ninteg <= 1)
4094  nbgauss = 1;
4095  else if (cell_type == IT_Line2 || cell_type == IT_Line3)
4096  nbgauss = ninteg;
4097  else if (cell_type == IT_Quad4 || cell_type == IT_Quad8)
4098  nbgauss = ninteg2;
4099  else if (cell_type == IT_Hexaedron8 || cell_type == IT_Hexaedron20)
4100  nbgauss = ninteg3;
4101 
4102  else if (ninteg == 2) {
4103  switch (cell_type) {
4104  default:
4105  break;
4106 
4107  case IT_Triangle3:
4108  case IT_Triangle6:
4109  nbgauss = 3;
4110  break;
4111 
4112  case IT_Tetraedron4:
4113  case IT_Tetraedron10:
4114  nbgauss = 4;
4115  break;
4116 
4117  case IT_Pentaedron6:
4118  nbgauss = 6;
4119  break;
4120 
4121  case IT_Pyramid5:
4122  nbgauss = 5;
4123  break;
4124  }
4125  }
4126  else if (ninteg == 3) {
4127  switch (cell_type) {
4128  default:
4129  break;
4130 
4131  case IT_Triangle3:
4132  case IT_Triangle6:
4133  nbgauss = 4;
4134  break;
4135 
4136  case IT_Tetraedron4:
4137  case IT_Tetraedron10:
4138  nbgauss = 5;
4139  break;
4140 
4141  case IT_Pentaedron6:
4142  nbgauss = 8;
4143  break;
4144 
4145  case IT_Pyramid5:
4146  nbgauss = 6;
4147  break;
4148  }
4149  }
4150  else if (ninteg >= 4) {
4151  switch (cell_type) {
4152  default:
4153  break;
4154 
4155  case IT_Triangle3:
4156  case IT_Triangle6:
4157  nbgauss = 7;
4158  break;
4159 
4160  case IT_Tetraedron4:
4161  case IT_Tetraedron10:
4162  nbgauss = 15;
4163  break;
4164 
4165  case IT_Pentaedron6:
4166  nbgauss = 21;
4167  break;
4168 
4169  case IT_Pyramid5:
4170  nbgauss = 27;
4171  break;
4172  }
4173  }
4174  return nbgauss;
4175  }
4176 
4177  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4183  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4184  static inline Real3 getGaussRefPosition(ItemWithNodes cell, Integer ninteg, Integer rank)
4185  {
4186  auto cell_type = cell.type();
4187  Integer nint{ ninteg };
4188 
4189  if (nint < 1)
4190  nint = 1;
4191 
4192  if (cell_type == IT_Line2 || cell_type == IT_Line3)
4193  return lineRefPosition({ rank, -1, -1 }, { nint, 0, 0 });
4194 
4195  if (cell_type == IT_Quad4 || cell_type == IT_Quad8) {
4196  auto in{ 0 };
4197  for (Int32 i1 = 0; i1 < nint; ++i1) {
4198  for (Int32 i2 = 0; i2 < nint; ++i2) {
4199 
4200  if (rank == in)
4201  return quadRefPosition({ i1, i2, -1 }, { nint, nint, 0 });
4202 
4203  ++in;
4204  }
4205  }
4206  }
4207 
4208  if (cell_type == IT_Hexaedron8 || cell_type == IT_Hexaedron20) {
4209  auto in{ 0 };
4210  for (Int32 i1 = 0; i1 < nint; ++i1) {
4211  for (Int32 i2 = 0; i2 < nint; ++i2) {
4212  for (Int32 i3 = 0; i3 < nint; ++i3) {
4213 
4214  if (rank == in)
4215  return hexaRefPosition({ i1, i2, i3 }, { nint, nint, nint });
4216 
4217  ++in;
4218  }
4219  }
4220  }
4221  }
4222 
4223  if (cell_type == IT_Triangle3 || cell_type == IT_Triangle6) {
4224  auto o{ 3 };
4225  if (nint <= 3)
4226  o = nint - 1;
4227 
4228  return { xg1[o][rank], xg2[o][rank], 0. };
4229  }
4230 
4231  if (cell_type == IT_Tetraedron4 || cell_type == IT_Tetraedron10) {
4232  auto o{ 3 };
4233  if (nint <= 3)
4234  o = nint - 1;
4235 
4236  return { xtet[o][rank], ytet[o][rank], ztet[o][rank] };
4237  }
4238 
4239  if (cell_type == IT_Pyramid5) {
4240  auto o{ 1 };
4241  if (nint <= 2)
4242  o = 0;
4243 
4244  return { xpyr[o][rank], ypyr[o][rank], zpyr[o][rank] };
4245  }
4246 
4247  if (cell_type == IT_Pentaedron6) {
4248  auto o{ 1 };
4249  if (nint <= 2)
4250  o = 0;
4251 
4252  return { xpent[o][rank], ypent[o][rank], zpent[o][rank] };
4253  }
4254  return {};
4255  }
4256 
4257  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4263  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4264  static inline Real getGaussWeight(ItemWithNodes cell, Integer ninteg, Integer rank)
4265  {
4266  auto cell_type = cell.type();
4267  Integer nint{ ninteg };
4268 
4269  if (nint < 1)
4270  nint = 1;
4271 
4272  if (cell_type == IT_Line2 || cell_type == IT_Line3)
4273  return lineWeight({ rank, -1, -1 }, { nint, 0, 0 });
4274 
4275  if (cell_type == IT_Quad4 || cell_type == IT_Quad8) {
4276  auto in{ 0 };
4277  for (Int32 i1 = 0; i1 < nint; ++i1) {
4278  for (Int32 i2 = 0; i2 < nint; ++i2) {
4279 
4280  if (rank == in)
4281  return quadWeight({ i1, i2, -1 }, { nint, nint, 0 });
4282 
4283  ++in;
4284  }
4285  }
4286  }
4287 
4288  if (cell_type == IT_Hexaedron8 || cell_type == IT_Hexaedron20) {
4289  auto in{ 0 };
4290  for (Int32 i1 = 0; i1 < nint; ++i1) {
4291  for (Int32 i2 = 0; i2 < nint; ++i2) {
4292  for (Int32 i3 = 0; i3 < nint; ++i3) {
4293 
4294  if (rank == in)
4295  return hexaWeight({ i1, i2, i3 }, { nint, nint, nint });
4296 
4297  ++in;
4298  }
4299  }
4300  }
4301  }
4302 
4303  if (cell_type == IT_Triangle3 || cell_type == IT_Triangle6) {
4304  auto o{ 3 };
4305  if (nint <= 3)
4306  o = nint - 1;
4307 
4308  return wg[o][rank];
4309  }
4310 
4311  if (cell_type == IT_Tetraedron4 || cell_type == IT_Tetraedron10) {
4312  if (nint == 1)
4313  return wgtet1;
4314  if (nint == 2)
4315  return wgtet2;
4316  if (nint == 3) {
4317  auto i = npwgtet3[rank];
4318  return wgtet3[i];
4319  }
4320  // nint >= 4
4321  auto i = npwgtet4[rank];
4322  return wgtet4[i];
4323  }
4324 
4325  if (cell_type == IT_Pyramid5) {
4326  if (nint <= 2)
4327  return wgpyr2;
4328 
4329  // nint >= 3
4330  auto i = npwgpyr3[rank];
4331  return wgpyr3[i];
4332  }
4333 
4334  if (cell_type == IT_Pentaedron6) {
4335  if (nint <= 2)
4336  return wgpent2;
4337 
4338  // nint >= 3
4339  auto i = npwgpent3[rank];
4340  return wgpent3[i];
4341  }
4342 
4343  return 1.;
4344  }
4345 
4346  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4354  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4355  static inline Real getRefPosition(Integer indx, Integer ordre)
4356  {
4357  Real x = xgauss1; // default is order 1
4358 
4359  switch (ordre) {
4360  case 2:
4361  x = xgauss2[indx];
4362  break;
4363  case 3:
4364  x = xgauss3[indx];
4365  break;
4366  case 4:
4367  x = xgauss4[indx];
4368  break;
4369  case 5:
4370  x = xgauss5[indx];
4371  break;
4372  case 6:
4373  x = xgauss6[indx];
4374  break;
4375  case 7:
4376  x = xgauss7[indx];
4377  break;
4378  case 8:
4379  x = xgauss8[indx];
4380  break;
4381  case 9:
4382  x = xgauss9[indx];
4383  break;
4384  default:
4385  break;
4386  }
4387  return x;
4388  }
4389 
4390  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4397  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4398  static inline Real getWeight(Integer indx, Integer ordre)
4399  {
4400  Real w = wgauss1; // default is order 1
4401 
4402  switch (ordre) {
4403  case 2:
4404  w = wgauss2[indx];
4405  break;
4406  case 3:
4407  w = wgauss3[indx];
4408  break;
4409  case 4:
4410  w = wgauss4[indx];
4411  break;
4412  case 5:
4413  w = wgauss5[indx];
4414  break;
4415  case 6:
4416  w = wgauss6[indx];
4417  break;
4418  case 7:
4419  w = wgauss7[indx];
4420  break;
4421  case 8:
4422  w = wgauss8[indx];
4423  break;
4424  case 9:
4425  w = wgauss9[indx];
4426  break;
4427  default:
4428  break;
4429  }
4430  return w;
4431  }
4432 
4433  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4440  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4441 
4442  static inline Real3 lineRefPosition(Integer3 indices, Integer3 ordre)
4443  {
4444  return { getRefPosition(indices[0], ordre[0]), 0., 0. };
4445  }
4446 
4447  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4454  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4455  static inline Real3 triRefPosition(Integer3 indices, Integer3 ordre)
4456  {
4457  Integer o = ordre[0] - 1;
4458  Integer i = indices[0];
4459  return { xg1[o][i], xg2[o][i], 0. };
4460  }
4461 
4462  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4469  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4470  static inline Real3 quadRefPosition(Integer3 indices, Integer3 ordre)
4471  {
4472  Real3 pos;
4473  for (Integer i = 0; i < 2; i++)
4474  pos[i] = getRefPosition(indices[i], ordre[i]);
4475  return pos;
4476  }
4477 
4478  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4485  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4486  static inline Real3 hexaRefPosition(Integer3 indices, Integer3 ordre)
4487  {
4488  Real3 pos;
4489  for (Integer i = 0; i < 3; i++)
4490  pos[i] = getRefPosition(indices[i], ordre[i]);
4491  return pos;
4492  }
4493 
4494  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4501  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4502  [[maybe_unused]] static inline Real3 tetraRefPosition(Integer3 indices, Integer3 /*ordre*/)
4503  {
4504  Integer i = indices[0];
4505  return { xit[i], yit[i], zit[i] };
4506  }
4507 
4508  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4515  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4516  [[maybe_unused]] static inline Real3 pentaRefPosition(Integer3 indices, Integer3 ordre)
4517  {
4518 
4519  // Same as TriRefPosition on reference coordinate plane (r,s)
4520  // and LineRefPosition along reference coordinate t (vertical)
4521  auto pos = triRefPosition(indices, ordre);
4522  pos.z = getRefPosition(indices[2], ordre[2]);
4523 
4524  return pos;
4525  }
4526 
4527  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4534  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4535  static inline Real lineWeight(Integer3 indices, Integer3 ordre)
4536  {
4537  return getWeight(indices[0], ordre[0]);
4538  }
4539 
4540  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4547  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4548  static inline Real triWeight(Integer3 indices, Integer3 ordre)
4549  {
4550  return wg[ordre[0] - 1][indices[0]];
4551  }
4552 
4553  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4560  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4561  static inline Real quadWeight(Integer3 indices, Integer3 ordre)
4562  {
4563  Real w = 1.;
4564  for (Integer i = 0; i < 2; i++)
4565  w *= getWeight(indices[i], ordre[i]);
4566  return w;
4567  }
4568 
4569  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4576  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4577  static inline Real hexaWeight(Integer3 indices, Integer3 ordre)
4578  {
4579  Real w = 1.;
4580  for (Integer i = 0; i < 3; i++)
4581  w *= getWeight(indices[i], ordre[i]);
4582  return w;
4583  }
4584 
4585  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4592  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4593  [[maybe_unused]] static inline Real tetraWeight(Integer3 /*indices*/, Integer3 /*ordre*/)
4594  {
4595  return wgtetra;
4596  }
4597 
4598  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4605  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4606  [[maybe_unused]] static inline Real pentaWeight(Integer3 indices, Integer3 ordre)
4607  {
4608 
4609  // Same as TriWeight on reference coordinate plane (r,s)
4610  // and LineWeight with ordre[2] to account for reference coordinate t (vertical)
4611  Real wgpenta = triWeight(indices, ordre) * getWeight(indices[2], ordre[2]);
4612  return wgpenta;
4613  }
4614 
4615  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4616  };
4617 };
4618 
4619 #endif // ARCANE_FEM_FUNCTIONS_H
ArcaneFemFunctions::BoundaryConditions2D
Provides methods for applying boundary conditions in 3D FEM problems.
Definition: ArcaneFemFunctions.h:2282
ArcaneFemFunctions::BoundaryConditions2D::applyNeumannToRhs

Applies Neumann conditions to the right-hand side (RHS) values.

Applies a nodal field to the RHS vector.
